caption:
I avoided opening this cabinet for two whole years.

Every time I opened it I had to do a Tetris move just to grab dish soap. The wasted vertical space mocked me. There was room for two of everything if I could just get to it.

The Simple Houseware 2-tier sliding basket fixed it in 4 minutes — no tools, no drilling, just sets on the cabinet floor. Each tier slides independently.

Doubled my usable storage without buying a single new container. The cabinet went from chaos to a system in one afternoon.

Comment LINK and I'll reply with the link.
Amazon affiliate — I earn a small commission at no extra cost to you.
